arts.ttl: Como take on Juventus to kick-off matchday 24
arts.sum: Randal Kolo Muani (three goals in two Serie A matches) could become the first Juventus player to score in each of his first three Serie A appearances in the three points for a win era (since 1994/95). Como will look for points in the battle for survival in their match against Juventus, who are hoping to build on their win last weekend.
